channel.title: Private Endpoints on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Private Endpoints on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Managed virtual network for evaluations in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry now generally supports managed virtual networks for evaluations. This lets cloud evaluation jobs reach models and agents protected by private endpoints using a Foundry-managed VNET for outbound connectivity.

  • Source: Azure Updates
